arts.ttl: Nico Williams transfer demand made: Barcelona move for Arsenal and Chelsea target
arts.sum: Nico Williams will only move to Barcelona on one condition, enhancing the chances of Premier League giants Arsenal and Chelsea to sign the Spain winger. Nico Williams had reportedly preferred to remain in Spain than move to England last summer, yet the prospect of signing him has improved for both Arsenal and Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Athletic Club star confirms plans to apologise to Real Sociedad’s Mikel Oyarzabal
arts.sum: Athletic Club star Yuri Berchiche has admitted that he intends to issue a personal apology to Real Sociedad attacker Mikel Oyarzabal. This comes owing to an incident between the pair…

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Barça remain keen on Nico Williams
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly continue to be linked with a move for Athletic Club's Nico Williams. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.
